name: Tecstar Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Tecstar Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the production and sale of inductors in Taiwan. It offers multilayer chip beads and inductors, including multilayer ferrite chip beads, multilayer chip inductors, and multilayer common mode filters; SMD power inductors and EMI beads, such as SMD power inductors, SMD common mode chokes, and wound chip beads and inductors; and Ni-Zn soft ferrite cores that include EMI suppression ferrite cores and SMD power inductor cores. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.
